title: Pier W4 Shaft Extension – Historic Fill Voids
description: Drilled shaft DS-W4-03 required extension 4 feet below design tip elevation due to void zones in historic landfill material. Additional drilling
schedule_impact_days: and rebar. Structural engineer directed extension after bearing review.

title: Duwamish Marine Traffic Monitoring System
description: SDOT directed installation of AIS vessel tracking system and real-time marine traffic monitoring kiosk at both bridge landings. Scope not included in original contract. Includes hardware

title: Enhanced Corrosion Protection – Stay Cables
description: Engineer directed upgrade of stay cable sheathing from HDPE to stainless steel wire wrap outer layer at all 48 cables due to revised corrosion analysis for marine environment proximity. Additional material and installation labor.

title: Montlake Lid – Art Installation Infrastructure
description: WSDOT directed addition of electrical rough-in
amount: and concrete pads for three public art installations specified by WSDOT Art Program. Scope not in original contract.

title: SR-520 Lid – Utility Conflict at West Abutment
description: Undisclosed 12-inch gas main discovered at west abutment requiring relocation prior to lid foundation work. PSE directed relocation. Includes shoring

title: Ballard Bridge – Additional Pier Jacket
description: Geotechnical investigation during construction revealed Pier 6 has greater section loss than anticipated in design. Engineer directed concrete jacket at Pier 6 in addition to originally specified Piers 2 4 8 and 11.
